---
title: "Dr. Gang He"
#description-meta: "{{<p meta description-meta >}}"
image: files/profile/gang-he-cuny-profile.jpg
page-navigation: false
toc: false
#sidebar: false
page-layout: full

about:
  id: hero-heading
  template: trestles
  image-width: 70%
  links:
    - icon: sun
      text: Mainpage
      href: https://www.ganghe.net
    - icon: globe
      text: CUNYprofile
      href: https://www.baruch.cuny.edu/profiles/faculty/Gang-He
    - icon: envelope
      text: E-mail
      href: mailto:gang.he@baruch.cuny.edu
#    - icon: github
#      text: Github
#      href: https://github.com/drganghe
#    - icon: twitter
#      text: Twitter
#      href: https://twitter.com/DrGangHe
#    - icon: mastodon
#      text: Mastodon
#      href: https://mastodon.social/@hegang      
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://linkedin.com/in/hegang
    - icon: youtube
      text: YouTube
      href: https://www.youtube.com/@DrGangHe      
    - text: "{{< ai orcid >}} ORCID"   # use academic icons, "" are needed
      href: https://orcid.org/0000-0002-8416-1965
    - text: "{{< ai clarivate >}} Web of Science"
      href: https://www.webofscience.com/wos/author/record/N-4549-2013  
    - text: "{{< ai scopus >}} Scopus"
      href: https://www.scopus.com/authid/detail.uri?authorId=55607981900
    - text: "{{< ai google-scholar >}} Google Scholar"
      href: https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=vf90AuEAAAAJ
    - text: "{{< ai researchgate >}} Research Gate"
      href: https://www.researchgate.net/profile/Gang-He-19

listing:
  - id: recent-posts
    contents: /posts
    type: grid
    max-items: 3
    page-size: 0 #set as 0 will remove the page setting
    fields: [image, date, title, author, description]
    max-description-length: 75
    sort: 
      - "date desc"
      - "title asc"
---

<link rel="me" href="https://mastodon.social/@hegang">

{{< include /files/includes/_msclarity.qmd >}}


:::{#hero-heading}

Dr. He is an energy scholar, researcher, and teacher.  He is an Assistant Professor in the [Marxe School of Public and International Affairs](https://marxe.baruch.cuny.edu/about/faculty-and-staff/full-time-faculty/){.external target="_blank"}, Baruch College, City University of New York. He studies and teaches energy systems, energy and climate policy, and clean energy transition. His work advances data-driven, evidence-based energy and climate policy research and offers policy insights for energy decisions and climate actions to achieve carbon neutrality. 

Dr. He has published in high-impact interdisciplinary and field journals such as [*Nature*](/posts/2022-10-nature-cost-savings-of-global-solar-pv-value-chains/index.qmd) (Clean Energy Global Supply Chain), [*Nature Energy*](/posts/2023-07-nenergy-climate-change-impacts-supply-demand-match/index.qmd) (Climate Impacts on Energy Systems), [*Nature Water*](/posts/2023-08-naturewater-global-assessment-of-the-carbon-water-tradeoff-of-dry-cooling/index.qmd) (Electricity-Water-Carbon Nexus), [*Nature Communications*](/posts/2020-05-ncomms-rapid-re-cost/index.qmd) (Low-cost Renewable Implications), [*One Earth*](/posts/2020-08-oneearth-coal-just-transition/index.qmd) (Just Coal Transition), [*Environmental Science \& Technology*](/posts/2016-est-switch-china/index.qmd) (Power Systems Decarbonization Modeling), [*Energy Policy*](/posts/2013-ep-carbon-offsetters-paradox/index.qmd) (Carbon Market). His research was reported by [*Nature*](/posts/2020-10-nature-news-carbon-neutrality/index.qmd), *Scientific American*, *Carbon Brief*, *National Geographic*, *New York Times*, *E\&E News*, among others. 

Dr. He’s work has direct policy impacts. He testified for the [New York State Climate Leadership and Community Protection Act](/posts/2019-nyclcpa-testimony/index.qmd) before it became law and has advised the New York State Climate Action Council’s [Scoping Plan](/posts/2021-12-nysclcpa-scoping-plan-draft/index.qmd). He has also involved in the U.S.-China collaboration on energy and climate change. 

Dr. He’s recent collaborative analysis on the cost savings of global solar PV supply chains was published by [*Nature*](/posts/2022-10-nature-cost-savings-of-global-solar-pv-value-chains/index.qmd), and was awarded the [Best Poster Award](/posts/2022-12-iamc-2022-best-poster-award/index.qmd) by the Integrated Assessment Modeling Consortium (2022). He was selected as Youth Delegate to UNFCCC CoP11 (2005), Asia 21 Young Leaders (2007), Aspen Environment Forum Scholars (2011), Young Scholar of Institute for New Economic Thinking (2013), and [ITIF Energy Innovation Policy and Management Scholar](https://itif.org/events/2019/05/19/2019-itif-energy-innovation-boot-camp-for-early-career-scholars/){.external target="_blank"} (2019). 

Dr. He has worked for the [Department of Technology and Society](https://www.stonybrook.edu/commcms/est/people/affiliated_faculty/GangHe.php){.external target="_blank"} at Stony Brook University, the [Program on Energy and Sustainable Development](https://pesd.fsi.stanford.edu/people/Gang_He){.external target="_blank"} at Stanford University. He received his Ph.D. in [Energy and Resources](https://erg.berkeley.edu/people/gang-he/){.external target="_blank"} from University of California, Berkeley. He also holds an M.A. in Climate and Society from Columbia University, and a B.S. and M.S. in Geography from Peking University.

:::

## Recent Posts
Check out the latest &nbsp;[Papers](posts.qmd#category=paper)&nbsp;, &nbsp;[News](posts.qmd#category=news)&nbsp;, &nbsp;[Events](posts.qmd#category=event)&nbsp;, and &nbsp;[More »](/posts.qmd)

:::{#recent-posts}
:::

<p align="right">[All Posts »](/posts.qmd)</p>
